definition.name: eps-jb-algebra
definition.definition: A finite-dim real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm and a commutative bilinear product ‚ąė with a‚ąėb=b‚ąėa and 1‚ąėa=a EXACT, satisfying for all a,b: (JB1) ||a‚ąėb||<=(1+eps)||a||||b||; (JB2) ||a‚ąėa||>=(1-eps)||a||^2; (JB3) a‚ąėa>=-eps||a||^2 1; (JB4) ||((a‚ąėa)‚ąėb)‚ąėa-(a‚ąėa)‚ąė(b‚ąėa)||<=eps||a||^3||b|| (the approximate Jordan identity, the target of this proposition). At eps=0 these are the JB-algebra axioms. [def-eps-jb-algebra]
